infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ReBookz needs access to your camera to take photos of the books you want to list for sale.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ReBookz needs access to your photo library to upload images of the books you want to list for sale.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ReBookz uses your location to show you books available for sale in your area (e.g., within 5km of your current spot) and to automatically set your city when you list a book for sale.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ReBookz uses your location to show you books available for sale in your area (e.g., within 5km of your current spot) and to automatically set your city when you list a book for sale.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: ReBookz uses your location to show you books available for sale in your area (e.g., within 5km of your current spot) and to automatically set your city when you list a book for sale.
